title: helichrysum elodes
intro: Helichrysum elodes, also known as the mountain everlast, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is native to the mountains of South Africa and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum elodes include reducing inflammation and pain, improving circulation, and supporting immune function, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Helichrysum elodes can be prepared as an essential oil, tincture, or tea, which are often used to address various health issues, including arthritis, wounds, and respiratory problems.
